children.heading: Creation of Trust Fund
children.label: a Creation of Trust Fund
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a trust fund to be known as the “Vaccine Injury Compensation Trust Fund”, consisting of such amounts as may be appropriated or credited to such Trust Fund as provided in this section or section 9602(b).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There are hereby appropriated to the Vaccine Injury Compensation Trust Fund amounts equivalent to the net revenues received in the Treasury from the tax imposed by section 4131 (relating to tax on certain vaccines).

children.label: A
children.text: the taxes received in the Treasury under section 4131 (relating to tax on certain vaccines), over

children.label: B
children.text: the decrease in the tax imposed by chapter 1 resulting from the tax imposed by section 4131.

children.heading: Limitation on transfers to Vaccine Injury Compensation Trust Fund
children.label: 3 Limitation on transfers to Vaccine Injury Compensation Trust Fund
A
children.text: any provision of law which is not contained or referenced in this title or in a revenue Act, and

children.label: B
children.text: whether such provision of law is a subsequently enacted provision or directly or indirectly seeks to waive the application of this paragraph.

children.label: ii
children.text: which is a taxable vaccine (as defined in section 4132(a)(1)) at the time compensation is paid under such subtitle 2, or

children.label: B
children.text: the payment of all expenses of administration (but not in excess of $9,500,000 for any fiscal year) incurred by the Federal Government in administering such subtitle.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall pay from time to time from the Vaccine Injury Compensation Trust Fund into the general fund of the Treasury amounts equivalent to amounts paid under section 4132(b) and section 6416 with respect to the taxes imposed by section 4131.

children.heading: Transfers based on estimates
children.label: B Transfers based on estimates
children.text: Transfers under subparagraph (A) shall be made on the basis of estimates by the Secretary, and proper adjustments shall be made in the amounts subsequently transferred to the extent prior estimates were in excess of or less than the amounts required to be transferred.

children.heading: Liability of United States limited to amount in Trust Fund
children.label: d Liability of United States limited to amount in Trust Fund

children.heading: General rule
children.label: 1 General rule
children.text: Any claim filed against the Vaccine Injury Compensation Trust Fund may be paid only out of such Trust Fund.

children.heading: Coordination with other provisions
children.label: 2 Coordination with other provisions
children.text: Nothing in the National Childhood Vaccine Injury Act of 1986 (or in any amendment made by such Act) shall authorize the payment by the United States Government of any amount with respect to any such claim out of any source other than the Vaccine Injury Compensation Trust Fund.

children.heading: Order in which unpaid claims to be paid
children.label: 3 Order in which unpaid claims to be paid
children.text: If at any time the Vaccine Injury Compensation Trust Fund has insufficient funds to pay all of the claims out of such Trust Fund at such time, such claims shall, to the extent permitted under paragraph (1) be paid in full in the order in which they are finally determined.
